content.en:
"This Nine Primordial Ancestors actually scraped more than a hundred drops of Taishi Golden Liquid!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, this guy has collected a lot of Taishi gold liquid, and now he is cheaper.

Moreover, there were also a lot of resource treasures on the Nine Primordial Ancestors, and there were hundreds of treasures that even the Fifth Primordial Ancestor needed.

"Yes, I made a lot of money this time!"

Ye Tian said with satisfaction.

......

The Toothless Gate.

Ye Tian notified Feng Ming's original ancestor as soon as possible.

"Elder Fengming, the Nine Primordial Ancestors are dead!"

Ye Tian said.

Swish!

Feng Ming Origin Ancestor instantly appeared in front of Ye Tian and said in shock: "The Nine Origin Ancestors are dead, and you killed them?"

"Yes, he was killed by luck!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, great!"

Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor said excitedly.

Immediately, she deduced that she really couldn't sense the aura of the Nine Primordial Ancestors in the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain, and his incarnation must have collapsed.

This is enough to prove that the Nine Primordial Ancestors are really dead!

......

Nine Lights Holy Gate.

The aura of the incarnation of the Nine Primordial Ancestors disappeared, immediately attracting the attention of the Dawn Saint Ancestor.

He immediately came to the residence of the Nine Ancestors of the Nine Ancestors.

"I can't sense the incarnation of the Nine Venerables, the incarnation has disappeared, is it ......?"

The Dawn Saint Ancestor's face was ugly.

He was most worried about the fall of the Nine Primordial Ancestors, that would be the loss of the entire Nine Light Holy Gate!

"Impossible, those Triple Ancestors of the Supreme Treasure Land, who can kill the Nine Venerables? No, they can't kill the Nine Venerables!" muttered the Dawn Saint Ancestor.

"Use the Nine Souls Tower to confirm the life and death of the Nine Ancestors!"

Dawn Holy Ancestor Dao.

As the peak powerhouse of the Fivefold Ancestor of the Nine Light Holy Gate, he has a very high status, so he is naturally qualified to use the Nine Soul Tower.

Soon, he came to the Nine Souls Pagoda and used the Nine Souls Pagoda to determine the life and death of the Nine Souls.

And this matter quickly attracted the attention of the other fivefold ancestors.

"Elder Chenxi, what's wrong, why do you want to use the Nine Souls Tower?"

A fivefold ancestor asked.

"Something happened to Jiuzun, I will use the Nine Souls Tower to confirm his life and death. Dawn Holy Ancestor said.

"What, something happened to the Nine Venerables?"

The faces of the five ancestors changed, if they fell, then the loss of the Nine Light Holy Gate this time would be too great!

Because the Nine Lights Holy Gate has invested a lot of resources in the Nine Ancestors of the Nine Ancestors, the price paid is too great!

Rumble!!!!

The Dawn Holy Ancestor urged the Nine Souls Tower, and through the connection between the Nine Souls Tower and the Nine Primordial Ancestors, it ran through the Primordial Black Sea, no matter where the Nine Primordial Ancestors were hiding, they would be sensed by the Nine Souls Tower's breath, thus confirming whether he was alive or not.

However.

"Nope!"

"Still nothing!"

After a long time, the Dawn Saint Ancestor finally determined that the Nine Primordial Ancestors had fallen.

There is no longer the breath of the Nine Primordial Ancestors between heaven and earth, he has completely fallen, and when he reaches the level of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, he can't be resurrected at all!

"Jiuzun, it's fallen!"

The Dawn Saint Ancestor sighed.

At this time, the expressions of the other fivefold ancestors also changed greatly.

"Nine Venerables are almost invincible among the Triple Ancestors, who can kill him? This time, there are a few mysterious half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor powerhouses who have sent some Triple Origin Ancestors in, could it be one of them?"

"There is also the possibility of the Endless Ancestor of the Void Fang Holy Gate, this strength is terrifying, and it is also possible to kill the Nine Venerables!"

"As soon as the Nine Venerables die, they will really die, this kind of disciple who has no will clone should not be allowed to enter the Supreme Treasure Land, honestly stay in the Nine Light Holy Gate to cultivate, and cultivate until the Fifth Ancestral Ancestor, isn't it?"

"This death, all the cultivation is in vain!"

"I said that it shouldn't be cultivated so vigorously, if it is not vigorously cultivated, this time the Nine Venerables will not dare to enter the Supreme Treasure Land!"

These Fivefold Ancestors spoke one by one, and their words were full of regret.

The Dawn Saint Ancestor was annoyed, but he didn't know what to say and left directly.

He also knew very well that this time the Nine Venerables fell, the other Fivefold Ancestors would not care too much, they were just pity for the resources paid by the Nine Lights Holy Gate.

Even because of this fall, many Fivefold Ancestors would still be dissatisfied with him.

If it weren't for his strength being strong enough, far surpassing the ordinary Fivefold Ancestor, I'm afraid he would have to be angry with this group of guys right now.

"A group of extremely stupid guys, waiting for me to step into the half-step Sixfold Ancestor realm, you will regret it one after another. "

The Dawn Holy Ancestor said secretly.

And once he broke through to the half-step sixfold Origin Ancestor realm, he would definitely kill the Endless Origin Ancestor of the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

In his opinion, the Endless Origin Ancestor had the greatest possibility of killing the Nine Venerables.

It's just that there was a rule between the Fivefold Holy Gate, and the Fivefold Ancestor was not allowed to act casually.

And even if he was the existence of the peak of the fivefold primordial ancestor, he would not dare to violate such a rule, after all, the primordial ancestor who formulated this rule was those half-step sixfold primordial ancestors!

But once he became a half-step sixfold ancestor, his strength would increase many times, and naturally he would not need to abide by this rule.

......

Time passed slowly, and the resources inside the Supreme Treasure Land gradually became scarce, after all, there were many ancestors who entered here, and after such a long time, many resources were found.

At this point, the killings began to mount.

Of course, no one dared to attack Ye Tian, but Fan sensed Ye Tian's breath and fled directly, for fear that he would be killed by Ye Tian later.

And during this period of time, the Holy Son of the Nine Light Holy Gate and the True Disciples were miserable, and many of them were killed by Ye Tian.

Gradually, the number of their sons was reduced to seven or eight.

This directly made the group of Fivefold Ancestors of the Nine Light Holy Gate extremely angry, even more angry than the death of the Nine Venerables.

After all, Jiuzun is dead, and it has little to do with them, but when this group of holy sons dies, they won't be able to get some resources, and the losses will be great!

Many of the Fivefold Ancestors of the Nine Light Holy Gate went to the Void Tooth Holy Gate to explain the law, and the atmosphere of the two Fivefold Holy Gates became tense.

"Endless Ancestor, let's keep a low profile, don't kill indiscriminately!"

Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor reminded.

"Got it!"

Ye Tian nodded.

......

You can't kill the original ancestor indiscriminately, which makes Ye Tian's harvest speed slow, after all, killing one more triple original ancestor, the harvest will have to skyrocket, which is much faster than slowly collecting resources by yourself.

However, if Ye Tian does not kill indiscriminately, it does not mean that someone does not kill indiscriminately.

An extremely powerful Triple Ancestor was slaughtering everywhere, and many Holy Sons had fallen one by one.

this day.

Another Holy Son of the Nine Lights Holy Gate was killed, but the person who shot this time was not the Endless Ancestor, so the Nine Light Holy Gate could not find the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

Of course, not only the Nine Lights Holy Gate, but also the Holy Sons of the other Fivefold Holy Gates were also killed.

Although they are all clones, as soon as the clones die, the resources are gone, and what a huge loss!

No, the Void Tooth Holy Gate asked Ye Tian to find that Triple Ancestor and kill him.

Even if the other party is a disciple of the half-step sixfold ancestor, he must die.

In this regard, Ye Tian is naturally happy, after all, as long as he kills the other party, he can harvest countless resources!

"Don't worry, wait for the other party to kill more Holy Sons, and then I'll make another move!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It's shameless to do so, but no one is going to say anything.
